title: Kill Bonds by Faction
query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(AwardingFaction, 'Unknown') AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM FactionKillBond WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY AwardingFaction ORDER BY value DESC
